1824800.name: Fast Fruit
1824800.description:
Panda is hungry and fancies some of his favorite snacks: Fruit! - Help him collect his fruit as quickly as possible.

In this arcade-like speed-game, it is your task to satisfy your Red Panda by collecting his snacks in the fastest time possible.
Not happy with your time? Try again! You might even try and set a world record!

Calculate the directions of the flying snacks and get used to the mechanics to shave off these crucial seconds in your battle against time.
1824800.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
